case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS VINCENT ESQUIVEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL $351.66 PRINCIPAL, $334.12 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $699.78, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 472773. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 1/26/88. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $6.71 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 472773 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VINCENT ESQUIVEL
